captures.notes: Captured from the user-team Match Setup helmet preview.

captures.label: Halftime report

notes: The helmet preview canvas was verified hidden after leaving Match Setup.
Halftime and final are representative renders of actual app UI components because the app does not expose a safe direct state setter for those phases.
